lines.gurmukhi: ਅਨਿਕ ਰੂਪ ਖਿਨ ਮਾਹਿ ਕੁਦਰਤਿ ਧਾਰਦਾ ॥
lines.translit: anik roop khin maeh kudarat dhaaradaa |
lines.english: By His creative power, He assumes numerous forms in an instant.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭੁ ਕਿਛੁ ਜਾਣੈ ਜਾਣੁ ਬੁਝਿ ਵੀਚਾਰਦਾ ॥
lines.translit: sabh kichh jaanai jaan bujh veechaaradaa |
lines.english: The Knower knows everything; He understands and contemplates.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸ ਨੋ ਲਾਇ ਸਚਿ ਤਿਸਹਿ ਉਧਾਰਦਾ ॥
lines.translit: jis no laae sach tiseh udhaaradaa |
lines.english: One whom the Lord attaches to the Truth is redeemed.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਦਾ ਅਭਗੁ ਦੀਬਾਣੁ ਹੈ ਹਉ ਤਿਸੁ ਨਮਸਕਾਰਦਾ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: sadaa abhag deebaan hai hau tis namasakaaradaa |4|
lines.english: His Court is eternal and imperishable; I humbly bow to Him. ||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸ ਦੈ ਹੋਵੈ ਵਲਿ ਸੁ ਕਦੇ ਨ ਹਾਰਦਾ ॥
lines.translit: jis dai hovai val su kade na haaradaa |
lines.english: One who has God on his side is never conquered.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕ ਮਃ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: salok mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Salok, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੀਵਦਿਆ ਨਿਤ ਜਾਪੀਐ ਨਾਨਕ ਸਾਚਾ ਨਾਉ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: jeevadiaa nit jaapeeai naanak saachaa naau |1|
lines.english: As long as you are alive, O Nanak, meditate continually on the True Name. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਾਮੁ ਕ੍ਰੋਧੁ ਲੋਭੁ ਛੋਡੀਐ ਦੀਜੈ ਅਗਨਿ ਜਲਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: kaam krodh lobh chhoddeeai deejai agan jalaae |
lines.english: Renounce sexual desire, anger and greed, and burn them in the fire.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਿਮਰਤ ਸਿਮਰਤ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਆਪਣਾ ਸਭ ਫਲ ਪਾਏ ਆਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: simarat simarat prabh aapanaa sabh fal paae aaeh |
lines.english: Meditating, meditating in remembrance on my God, I have obtained all the fruits.

lines.translit: mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਨਾਮੁ ਅਰਾਧਿਆ ਗੁਰ ਪੂਰੈ ਦੀਆ ਮਿਲਾਇ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: naanak naam araadhiaa gur poorai deea milaae |2|
lines.english: O Nanak, I worship the Naam, the Name of the Lord; the Perfect Guru has united me with the Lord. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਸ ਕੀ ਗਈ ਬਲਾਇ ਮਿਟੇ ਅੰਦੇਸਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: tis kee gee balaae mitte andesiaa |
lines.english: He avoids disaster, and his anxiety is dispelled.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋ ਮੁਕਤਾ ਸੰਸਾਰਿ ਜਿ ਗੁਰਿ ਉਪਦੇਸਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: so mukataa sansaar ji gur upadesiaa |
lines.english: One who has been instructed by the Guru is liberated in this world.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਸ ਕਾ ਦਰਸਨੁ ਦੇਖਿ ਜਗਤੁ ਨਿਹਾਲੁ ਹੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: tis kaa darasan dekh jagat nihaal hoe |
lines.english: Beholding the blessed vision of his Darshan, the world is over-joyed.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਨ ਕੈ ਸੰਗਿ ਨਿਹਾਲੁ ਪਾਪਾ ਮੈਲੁ ਧੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: jan kai sang nihaal paapaa mail dhoe |
lines.english: In the company of the Lord's humble servants, the world is over-joyed, and the filth of sin is washed away.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤੁ ਸਾਚਾ ਨਾਉ ਓਥੈ ਜਾਪੀਐ ॥
lines.translit: amrit saachaa naau othai jaapeeai |
lines.english: There, they meditate on the Ambrosial Nectar of the True Name.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸੁ ਘਟਿ ਵਸਿਆ ਨਾਉ ਤਿਸੁ ਬੰਧਨ ਕਾਟੀਐ ॥
lines.translit: jis ghatt vasiaa naau tis bandhan kaatteeai |
lines.english: One whose heart is filled with the Name, has his bonds cut away.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨ ਕਉ ਹੋਇ ਸੰਤੋਖੁ ਭੁਖਾ ਧ੍ਰਾਪੀਐ ॥
lines.translit: man kau hoe santokh bhukhaa dhraapeeai |
lines.english: The mind becomes content, and its hunger is satisfied.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕ ਮਃ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: salok mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Salok, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਪਰਸਾਦਿ ਕਿਨੈ ਵਿਰਲੈ ਹਰਿ ਧਨੁ ਖਾਟੀਐ ॥੫॥
lines.translit: gur parasaad kinai viralai har dhan khaatteeai |5|
lines.english: By Guru's Grace, some rare person earns the wealth of the Lord's Name. ||5||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨ ਮਹਿ ਚਿਤਵਉ ਚਿਤਵਨੀ ਉਦਮੁ ਕਰਉ ਉਠਿ ਨੀਤ ॥
lines.translit: man meh chitvau chitavanee udam krau utth neet |
lines.english: Within my mind, I think thoughts of always rising early, and making the effort.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਕੀਰਤਨ ਕਾ ਆਹਰੋ ਹਰਿ ਦੇਹੁ ਨਾਨਕ ਕੇ ਮੀਤ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: har keeratan kaa aaharo har dehu naanak ke meet |1|
lines.english: O Lord, my Friend, please bless Nanak with the habit of singing the Kirtan of the Lord's Praises. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਜੋ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਭਾਣੀਆ ਮਰਉ ਵਿਚਾਰੀ ਸੂਲਿ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: naanak jo prabh bhaaneea mrau vichaaree sool |2|
lines.english: O Nanak, those who are pleasing to God, have their cries of suffering taken away. ||2||

lines.translit: mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਦ੍ਰਿਸਟਿ ਧਾਰਿ ਪ੍ਰਭਿ ਰਾਖਿਆ ਮਨੁ ਤਨੁ ਰਤਾ ਮੂਲਿ ॥
lines.translit: drisatt dhaar prabh raakhiaa man tan rataa mool |
lines.english: Casting His Glance of Grace, God has saved me; my mind and body are imbued with the Primal Being.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੀਅ ਕੀ ਬਿਰਥਾ ਹੋਇ ਸੁ ਗੁਰ ਪਹਿ ਅਰਦਾਸਿ ਕਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: jeea kee birathaa hoe su gur peh aradaas kar |
lines.english: When your soul is feeling sad, offer your prayers to the Guru.

lines.gurmukhi: ਛੋਡਿ ਸਿਆਣਪ ਸਗਲ ਮਨੁ ਤਨੁ ਅਰਪਿ ਧਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: chhodd siaanap sagal man tan arap dhar |
lines.english: Renounce all your cleverness, and dedicate your mind and body to Him.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਧ ਜਨਾ ਕੈ ਸੰਗਿ ਭਵਜਲੁ ਬਿਖਮੁ ਤਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: saadh janaa kai sang bhavajal bikham tar |
lines.english: Joining the Saadh Sangat, the Company of the Holy, you shall cross over the terrifying and difficult world-ocean.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੇਵਹੁ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਦੇਵ ਅਗੈ ਨ ਮਰਹੁ ਡਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: sevahu satigur dev agai na marahu ddar |
lines.english: Serve the True Guru, and in the world hereafter, you shall not die of fear.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੂਜਹੁ ਗੁਰ ਕੇ ਪੈਰ ਦੁਰਮਤਿ ਜਾਇ ਜਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: poojahu gur ke pair duramat jaae jar |
lines.english: Worship the Feet of the Guru, and your evil-mindedness shall be burnt away.

lines.gurmukhi: ਖਿਨ ਮਹਿ ਕਰੇ ਨਿਹਾਲੁ ਊਣੇ ਸੁਭਰ ਭਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: khin meh kare nihaal aoone subhar bhar |
lines.english: In an instant, he shall make you happy, and the empty vessel shall be filled to overflowing.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨ ਕਉ ਹੋਇ ਸੰਤੋਖੁ ਧਿਆਈਐ ਸਦਾ ਹਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: man kau hoe santokh dhiaaeeai sadaa har |
lines.english: The mind becomes content, meditating forever on the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋ ਲਗਾ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਸੇਵ ਜਾ ਕਉ ਕਰਮੁ ਧੁਰਿ ॥੬॥
lines.translit: so lagaa satigur sev jaa kau karam dhur |6|
lines.english: He alone dedicates himself to the Guru's service, unto whom the Lord has granted His Grace. ||6||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕ ਮਃ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: salok mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Salok, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਲਗੜੀ ਸੁਥਾਨਿ ਜੋੜਣਹਾਰੈ ਜੋੜੀਆ ॥
lines.translit: lagarree suthaan jorranahaarai jorreea |
lines.english: I am attached to the right place; the Uniter has united me.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਲਹਰੀ ਲਖ ਸੈ ਆਨ ਡੁਬਣ ਦੇਇ ਨ ਮਾ ਪਿਰੀ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: naanak laharee lakh sai aan dduban dee na maa piree |1|
lines.english: O Nanak, there are hundreds and thousands of waves, but my Husband Lord does not let me drown. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਨਿ ਭੀਹਾਵਲੈ ਹਿਕੁ ਸਾਥੀ ਲਧਮੁ ਦੁਖ ਹਰਤਾ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮਾ ॥
lines.translit: ban bheehaavalai hik saathee ladham dukh harataa har naamaa |
lines.english: In the dreadful wilderness, I have found the one and only companion; the Name of the Lord is the Destroyer of distress.

lines.translit: mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਲਿ ਬਲਿ ਜਾਈ ਸੰਤ ਪਿਆਰੇ ਨਾਨਕ ਪੂਰਨ ਕਾਮਾਂ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: bal bal jaaee sant piaare naanak pooran kaamaan |2|
lines.english: I am a sacrifice, a sacrifice to the Beloved Saints, O Nanak; through them, my affairs have been brought to fulfillment. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਹੁਚਿ ਨ ਸਕੈ ਕੋਇ ਤੇਰੀ ਟੇਕ ਜਨ ॥
lines.translit: pahuch na sakai koe teree ttek jan |
lines.english: No one can equal Your humble servant, who has Your Support.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨ ਹੋਵੀ ਪਛੋਤਾਉ ਤੁਧ ਨੋ ਜਪਤਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: n hovee pachhotaau tudh no japatiaa |
lines.english: One does not have to suffer regret and repentance, when he meditates on You.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਾਈਅਨਿ ਸਭਿ ਨਿਧਾਨ ਤੇਰੈ ਰੰਗਿ ਰਤਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: paaeean sabh nidhaan terai rang ratiaa |
lines.english: All treasures are obtained, when we are attuned to Your Love.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਪੂਰੇ ਵਾਹੁ ਵਾਹੁ ਸੁਖ ਲਹਾ ਚਿਤਾਰਿ ਮਨ ॥
lines.translit: gur poore vaahu vaahu sukh lahaa chitaar man |
lines.english: Waaho! Waaho! How wonderful is the Perfect Guru! Cherishing Him in my mind, I obtain peace.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਪਹਿ ਸਿਫਤਿ ਭੰਡਾਰੁ ਕਰਮੀ ਪਾਈਐ ॥
lines.translit: gur peh sifat bhanddaar karamee paaeeai |
lines.english: The treasure of the Lord's Praise comes from the Guru; by His Mercy, it is obtained.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਨਦਰਿ ਨਿਹਾਲ ਬਹੁੜਿ ਨ ਧਾਈਐ ॥
lines.translit: satigur nadar nihaal bahurr na dhaaeeai |
lines.english: When the True Guru bestows His Glance of Grace, one does not wander any more.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਜੀਵਾ ਸੁਣਿ ਸੁਣੇ ॥੭॥
lines.translit: har har har har naam jeevaa sun sune |7|
lines.english: Listening, hearing the Name of the Lord, Har, Har, Har, Har, I live. ||7||

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਖੈ ਆਪਿ ਦਇਆਲੁ ਕਰਿ ਦਾਸਾ ਆਪਣੇ ॥
lines.translit: rakhai aap deaal kar daasaa aapane |
lines.english: The Merciful Lord preserves him - He makes him His own slave.
